title: Crunchy Steamy Saudia Monkfish Soup
description: A low-calorie-friendly, salty, and crunchy savory dish featuring monkfish, steamed in a blend of aromatic herbs and vegetables to provide hangover-cure benefits.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, chop the onion and garlic into small pieces.
Add chopped monkfish fillets, minced chili peppers, and fresh bay leaves. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Mix all ingredients together until evenly distributed.
Transfer the mixture into an oven-safe dish or baking tray. Make sure there are no excess liquid.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes on medium heat, or until monkfish is cooked through and crispy.
Remove from the oven and let it cool slightly before serving with fresh cilantro leaves if desired.
